JAMES E. McNAMARA
HAROLD J. STEIN
PATRICK K. RAFFERTY
NEIL HARRISON
ROBERT J. HARRIS
SCOTT M. SCHOENEWALD
RAINER W. MUELLER
MICHAEL S. KRAUSE
DAN SLATER
ARTHUR D. ROBERTS
DOUGLAS G. WIGHT
JAMES N. ROUSE
DAVID M. WARD
TERRY M. JOHNSON
CAROL S. STIMMEL
CHRISTINE L. EDSON
STEWART PRESSMAN
PAUL A. HASTINGS
RICHARD K. POWELL
A. PATRICK MUNOZ

OF COUNSEL
DAVID J. GARIBALDI, III

*A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION

February 1, 1991

Fair Political Practices Commission
428 "J" Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, California 95814

Attention: Legal Division

Dear Legal Division:

     This firm serves as the City Attorney for the City of
West Covina. This letter requests your advice on behalf of
City Councilmember Steve Herfert.

     Councilmember Herfert is an employee of Southern
California Edison ("PDidison"). He earns over $250 per year
and receives over $1,000 per year from his participation in
Edison's profit sharing plan. Edison is a regulated public
utility and a Fortune 500 company listed on the New York
Stock Exchange.

     The City of West Covina pays over $1.2 million per year
to Edison in electric bills. (To the best of our knowledge,
these payments are to the same entity which employs
Councilmember Herfert). The payments are authorized by City
Council approval of the warrant register. A similar
situation exists for the Redevelopment Agency (where
Councilmembers serve as Board members) although the payments
total only $800 per year. Based on the City's payment we
have advised Councilmember Herfert that he has a potential
conflict of interest under 2 Cal. Code of Regs. § 18702.2.


[illegible]

RUTAN & TUCKER
ATTORNEYS AT LAW
A PARTNERSHIP INCLUDING PROFESSIONAL CORPORATIONS


Fair Political Practices Commission
February 1, 1991
Page 2


     We would like for you to provide an opinion as well.
Please let me know if you need additional information.  My
direct telephone number is (714) 662-4644.

                                        Very truly yours,

                                        RUTAN & TUCKER

                                        [illegible]
                                        Elizabeth L. Hanna

ELH:jf
cc:  Steve Herfert

8/482/014125-0003/077
